overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi survival horror game showing a character in a futuristic spacesuit exploring a dimly lit industrial space station facility. The character moves through corridors and rooms with emergency red lighting, eventually interacting with a wrist-mounted holographic device to examine a collectible item.

events.description: reinforced airlock door opens revealing the facility interior beyond

agents.ego_description: standing in the airlock corridor as the door opens, preparing to enter the main facility

entered.detail: heavy metal airlock door with circular locking mechanism and warning labels
industrial metal wall panels with piping and conduits
digital control panel with illuminated buttons and screens

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a narrow industrial airlock corridor. The character stands facing a reinforced metal door which opens to reveal the facility interior. The space is lit by artificial ceiling lights with a cool teal color tone.

scene_state.functional_zone: main operations floor with glass lounge pods

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the main facility area, passing glass-walled lounge enclosures and server equipment

entered.detail: glass-walled lounge enclosure with green tinted glass and illuminated edges
tall metal server equipment with blinking lights and cables
wall-mounted emergency lighting panels glowing red
modern sofas inside the glass lounge area
industrial storage racks with equipment boxes

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a larger operations area featuring glass-walled lounge pods with green lighting, server racks, and red emergency lighting panels. The environment has a distinct sci-fi industrial aesthetic with metal flooring and scattered cables.

scene_state.functional_zone: small office workshop with tool storage

events.description: character turns and enters a side office room from the main operations floor

agents.ego_description: turning right to enter a small side office containing a red tool cabinet and workbench

entered.detail: bright red rolling tool cabinet with multiple drawers
dark wooden desk with papers and equipment
grey metal storage lockers against the wall
orange and black equipment cases mounted on the wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a smaller, dimly lit office space with carpeted flooring. A distinctive red tool cabinet stands prominently on the right, while metal lockers and an office desk occupy the left side of the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: office workbench area with interactive elements

events.description: character picks up a small electronic device from the red tool cabinet
character activates holographic wrist device to scan and examine the item

agents.ego_description: standing at the red cabinet, picking up and examining a collectible item using the wrist-mounted holographic interface

entered.detail: small electronic device with glowing blue light held in character's hand
white ceramic cup sitting on the red cabinet
holographic interface projecting from wrist device showing 'FORT SOLIS' text and data

segments.scene_description: The character interacts with objects on the red tool cabinet, picking up a small electronic device and using a holographic wrist interface to scan it. The wrist device projects a glowing display showing text and data about the item.

events.description: character finishes examining item and begins moving around the office to explore
character exits the office back into the main facility corridor

agents.ego_description: moving around the office, examining the computer desk and surroundings before heading back toward the exit

entered.detail: desktop computer screen displaying data on the office desk
illuminated desk lamp providing warm light on the work surface
ergonomic office chair on wheels positioned at the desk
glass partition door leading back to the main facility area

segments.scene_description: After placing the item back, the character explores the office, moving past the computer workstation with its illuminated desk lamp and office chair. The character then turns and exits through the glass door back into the main facility area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sterile industrial airlock into a cluttered office space and back out into a sprawling facility. It begins in a narrow corridor where a reinforced metal door opens to reveal a vast interior bathed in cool teal artificial light. As the character advances, the environment expands into a larger operations area characterized by metal flooring, server racks, and a contrast between green-lit lounge pods and red emergency panels. The scene then shifts into a dimly lit, carpeted office where the camera focuses on the character interacting with a red tool cabinet and activating a glowing holographic wrist interface to scan an electronic device. Finally, the camera moves past an illuminated workstation and office chair before turning back toward the glass door to exit the room and return to the main facility.
